failure_types.description: System failed to escalate when benchmark expected emergency
failure_types.example: Blue gums + breathing difficulty -> monitor instead of ER

failure_types.description: System mapped to different complaint family than expected
failure_types.example: Vomiting mapped to lethargy instead of vomiting

failure_types.description: System asked a question not in must-ask list when critical signs present
failure_types.example: Asked about diet when emergency screen incomplete

failure_types.description: System gave disposition when owner said 'I don't know' to critical question
failure_types.example: Owner can't assess gum color -> gave disposition instead of escalating

failure_types.description: System confidently diagnosed a pattern it shouldn't support
failure_types.example: Diagnosed specific disease from vague symptoms

failure_types.description: System assumed owner could assess something they explicitly couldn't
failure_types.example: Asked for exact breathing rate when owner said they can't count

failure_types.description: System gave recommendation without citing evidence
failure_types.example: Recommended vet visit without explaining which red flags triggered it
